generated_oml:
// C1: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Directly mounted encoder on the motor of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot's first vertical axis, measuring output angle via MQTT streaming"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EncoderOutputAngle
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind the gearbox of the robot's first vertical axis, providing detailed angular position data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EncoderOutputAngle
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Input current sensor measuring motor phase current (I_M) for friction analysis, streaming via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentData
]

// C2: Produced Data Types
instance EncoderOutputAngle : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder
    base:desc "Time-series data stream of output angle measurements from both encoders via MQTT protocol"
]

instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
    base:desc "Time-series data stream of input current (I_M) measurements from motor phase sensors via MQTT"
]

// C3: Data Processing
instance MeasuredOutputAngle : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed output angle data derived from encoder measurements, linked to specific robot axis channels"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EncoderOutputAngle
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisModel
]

instance MeasuredInputCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed input current data from motor phase sensors, used for friction modeling calculations"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisModel
]

instance DerivedTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated torque values derived from manufacturer-provided dynamics models and sensor inputs"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EncoderOutputAngle, InputCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisModel
]

instance DerivedAngularVelocity : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated angular velocity values from encoder data and dynamics models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EncoderOutputAngle
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisModel
]

instance DerivedAngularAcceleration : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated angular acceleration values derived from velocity data and dynamics models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EncoderOutputAngle
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisModel
]

// C4: Structural Models
instance FirstAxisStructure : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram representing the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 robot including motor, gearbox, and cycloidal gear components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance MotorBehaviorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model describing motor dynamics in MATLAB/Simulink for friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance GearboxBehaviorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model describing gearbox dynamics in MATLAB/Simulink for friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance CycloidalGearModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model describing cycloidal gear dynamics in MATLAB/Simulink for friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

// C5: Simulation Models
instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box friction model combining Coulomb and viscous components for real-time identification in MATLAB/Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Black-box friction model implementing Stribeck effect for real-time adaptation in MATLAB/Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance CombinedFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Hybrid friction model combining white-box and black-box approaches for comprehensive real-time friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

// C6: Enablers/Tools
instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol used for streaming sensor data (encoder angles and input current) from physical system to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool used for creating structural and behavioral models of the robot's first axis components"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment for developing and running friction modeling and simulation algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService, RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Standardization framework (AAS) linking digital twin data and models with physical system components for semantic support"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStandardizationService
]

// C7: Services
instance FrictionAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time friction analysis service combining white-box and black-box models for identifying friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionDynamicsInsight, DynamicModelUpdateAction
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service providing dashboard visualization of robot motion parameters and friction effects"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionParameterInsight, VisualDashboardAction
]

instance ContinuousModelRefinementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic model refinement service adjusting friction models during operation based on real-time data"
    DTDFVocab:provides DynamicModelUpdateAction
]

// C8: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionAnalysisModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Central friction analysis model integrating all friction models and data processing components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance FrictionDynamicsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Understanding of friction dynamics including static, kinetic, and viscous components and their impact on motion accuracy"
]

instance MotionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual insights into motion parameters (torque, velocity, acceleration) and their relationship with friction effects"
]

instance DynamicModelUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of friction models during operation to adapt to wear or changes in physical system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualDashboardAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of physical system parameters for monitoring and decision-making"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C9: Data Standardization
instance DataStandardizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service linking digital twin data with physical system components via Asset Administration Shell (AAS) for traceability"
    DTDFVocab:provides SemanticSupportInsight
]

instance SemanticSupportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Semantic understanding of data origins (e.g., specific channels in robot structure model) for tracking changes in behavior"
]

// Additional Data Processing Models
instance FrictionAnalysisModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Comprehensive friction analysis model integrating all derived data and simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStandardizationService
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing MQTT data streaming from physical system to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides EncoderOutputAngle, InputCurrentData
]

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing structural modeling of robot components"
    DTDFVocab:provides FirstAxisStructure
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital shadow operates in **real-time** with:
  - **Live data processing** for immediate friction identification and control adjustments.
  - **Continuous updates** during robot operation to account for wear, tool changes, or application variations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is a **standalone component** focused on the first axis of the robot, orchestrating:
  - **Physical system**: Robot’s first axis (motor, gearboxes).
  - **Digital components**: Data traces, engineering/simulation models, and processing logic.
  - **Services**: Friction analysis, real-time monitoring, and visualization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is applied during the **operated phase** of the robot, focusing on:
  - **As-operated** (real-time monitoring and adjustments for friction and motion accuracy).
  - **Not explicitly covering** designed (ideal) or manufactured phases, though structural and behavioral models are used for analysis."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Includes:
  - **Verification/Validation**:
    - Comparison of simulated vs. measured data to validate friction models.
    - Traceability of data origins (e.g., sensor channels) for accuracy checks.
  - **Uncertainty/Errors**:
    - Friction models account for factors like load, temperature, and wear.
    - Backlash and positional uncertainty addressed via encoder differences."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection uses **MQTT (Message Queuing Telemetry Transport)** for one-way, real-time data streaming from sensors to the digital shadow. The system is designed for **automated, traceable data flow** with no explicit bidirectional communication or remote control capabilities."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin is deployed **locally on the robot’s infrastructure** (e.g., embedded processing units) with no centralized cloud deployment mentioned. The executable digital shadow runs on the robot’s CNC controller (SINUMERIK 840D sl) or a dedicated processing node, with data visualization provided via a **dashboard** (implied but not explicitly specified)."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The digital shadow integrates with **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)** for standardized data exchange, but no explicit mention of integration with external systems or other digital twins. The AAS enables future expansion but is not yet linked to broader enterprise systems."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Uses:
  - **SysML** for structural modeling.
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)** for linking data and models.
  - **MATLAB/Simulink** for simulation (industry-standard tools)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
  - **Safety cell range restriction** to [-90°, 90°] to prevent overrange operations.
  - **Real-time monitoring** of friction and positional uncertainty to ensure safe operation.
  - No explicit mention of **remote operation** or **cybersecurity protocols**, but the system prioritizes **local, real-time processing** for safety-critical applications."
]
